title: Dragons Yeet Sheep
description:
Adds a keybind that lets you drop sheep passengers mid-flight while riding a dragon.
Made for Claws of Berk Modpack
body:
🐉 Built specifically for the Claws of Berk experience, Dragons Yeet Sheep lets dragon riders recreate the iconic airborne sheep-drop moments.

With a single keybind, you can release a carried sheep mid-flight — perfect for dragon training games, target practice, PvP mini-events, or pure Viking-style chaos.

Multiplayer-ready. Minimal performance impact. Maximum airborne livestock energy.
